landing.headline: Discover your intimate curiosity style in 2 minutes.
landing.subhead: An adult entertainment and self-exploration space designed to turn private answers into clear, conversation-ready language.
landing.principle_1_body: Curio is adult entertainment, not health care or medical or psychological advice. The frame is curiosity and conversation.
landing.principle_2_body: Individual mode is local-only by design: your answers live in the browser and are never sent to any server.
landing.principle_3_body: No one moves forward without confirming 18+ and agreeing to answer voluntarily. Sharing is always a separate decision.

age.heading: Confirm you're 18+
age.description: Curio is for adults only. Before continuing, we need your explicit age confirmation.
age.checkbox: I confirm I am 18 years of age or older.
age.hint_before: Please confirm your age to continue.

consent.heading: Consent before you answer
consent.description: Answering in Curio should be an adult, voluntary, and private decision. Check each point to continue.

items.adultEntertainment: I understand that Curio is adult entertainment and self-exploration — not health care, diagnosis, or medical or psychological advice.
items.voluntaryAnswers: I agree to answer voluntarily and can pause, leave, or skip any question at any time.
items.localOnly: I understand that individual mode is local-only: my answers are not sent to any server in this flow.
items.separateSharing: I understand that sharing results requires separate consent and is never tied to a purchase.

consent.hint_before: You need to accept all points before continuing.

ready.heading: You're all set to explore.
ready.description: Nothing has been saved. When the quiz starts, your individual answers stay in your browser.

results.heading: Your curiosity profile
results.disclaimer: Curio is a curiosity and conversation experience for adults. It is not health, not a diagnosis, not medical or psychological advice.
results.limits_explanation: You marked these topics as a hard limit. They will not appear as recommendations.
results.no_limits: You didn't mark any hard limits.
results.insight_intro: This isn't a diagnosis or a label. It's a map of where your curiosity is moving right now, so you have clearer words and can explore at your own pace.

profile.visual: The visual carries weight in your curiosity. Style, presence, atmosphere, and what you see spark something in you. It's not shallow: it's a real doorway into desire.
profile.sensorial: The sensory pulls at you: touch, texture, sound, closeness. Your curiosity runs through the body and through how an experience feels, not just the idea of it.
profile.emocional: Trust and emotional connection sit at the center of how you explore. You need to feel safe before you open up, and that's not a barrier: it's the ground your curiosity moves freely from.
profile.fantasia_narrativa: Your curiosity lives a lot in the imagination, as story, scene, or play. Enjoying something in fantasy is a whole territory of its own, separate from any intention to act on it.
profile.novedad: You're drawn to what's new, to surprise, to what breaks the routine. Novelty is part of how your curiosity lights up, and it works best with clear agreements holding it.
profile.validacion: Feeling desired, seen, valued, feeds your curiosity. Having the other person receive your desire without judgment matters a lot in how you open up.
profile.poder_consensuado: You're curious about the dynamic of leading or being led, always from agreement. What makes this work isn't the role, it's the trust and the shared yes behind it.
profile.comunicacion: Conversation is one of your strongest tools. Talking things through, putting words to them, asking yourself what you want, is central to how you explore and how you feel safe.

results.limits_intro: These are the topics you marked as firm boundaries. They don't appear as suggestions or recommendations. They're yours, and they're here to be clear and respected.

footer.disclaimer: Curio is adult entertainment and self-exploration. Not health care, diagnosis, or medical or psychological advice.
